ddls:
CREATE TABLE "provisions" (
  "provision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provision */,
  "category_code" INTEGER /* Code for the category of the provision */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the provision (e.g., Dealer regulations) */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the provision (e.g., Licensing) */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Name of the variable (e.g., dealer) */,
  "brief_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the provision */,
  "detailed_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the provision */,
  "coding_notes" TEXT /* Notes for coding the provision */,
  "coding_instructions" TEXT /* Instructions for coding the provision */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the provision */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the provision became effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the provision expires (if applicable) */,
  "is_repealed" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the provision has been repealed */,
  "repealed_date" TEXT /* Date when the provision was repealed (if applicable) */,
  "amendment_date" TEXT /* Date when the provision was last amended */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source for the provision */,
  "attribution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attribution for the provision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provisions_category_code FOREIGN KEY ("category_code") REFERENCES categories ("category_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provisions_sub_category FOREIGN KEY ("sub_category") REFERENCES sub_categories ("sub_category_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provisions_attribution_id FOREIGN KEY ("attribution_id") REFERENCES attribution ("attribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provisions_variable_name FOREIGN KEY ("variable_name") REFERENCES variables ("variable_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provisions_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_code" INTEGER /* Code for the category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Dealer regulations) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sub_categories" (
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-category */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the sub-category belongs to */,
  "sub_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the sub-category (e.g., Licensing) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the sub-category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variables" (
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variable */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Name of the variable (e.g., dealer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the variable */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the variable (e.g., boolean, integer, string) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state (e.g., CA, NY) */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Two-letter code for the state (e.g., CA, NY) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provision_states" (
  "provision_state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provision-state relationship */,
  "provision_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provision */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the provision became effective in the state */,
  "repealed_date" TEXT /* Date when the provision was repealed in the state (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provision_state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provision_states_provision_id FOREIGN KEY ("provision_id") REFERENCES provisions ("provision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provision_states_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, researcher) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the database */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the database */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attribution" (
  "attribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribution */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "attribution_text" TEXT /* Text of the attribution (e.g., 'Coded by Michael Siegel, MD, MPH, Boston University School of Public Health') */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the attribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attribution_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)
